title: Sigma & Gigachad Mod
description: Mod Adds real Gigachad & Sigma Mobs, Items, Ore Generation, Structures meme pistol food soup bed wood generate savanna dark forest craft textures shovel hoe structure alpha ai armor pickaxe
body:
### ALPHA VERSION NOW, NOT WORK WITH 1.21. 

This Mod adds new mobs, ores, equipment (pickaxe, sword, axe, shovel & etc) and armor to the your world sigma and gigachad meme mobs
